name: Australian Law MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server from Ansvar Systems providing full-text search across Australian legislation — statutes, acts, and provisions. Enables AI agents to search and retrieve Australian legal text for compliance research, legal analysis, and regulatory review workflows.
use_cases: Searching Australian legislation for compliance research from legal analysis agents
Retrieving specific acts and provisions for regulatory review agents
Legal research across Australian statutes from contract analysis agents
Automating regulatory compliance checking against Australian law from fintech/insurance agents
not_for: Case law or court decisions (statute/legislation focus only)
Legal advice — search tool only; always consult a qualified Australian solicitor
best_when: An agent needs to search and retrieve Australian legislation text for compliance analysis, regulatory review, or legal research purposes — accessing statute databases programmatically.
avoid_when: You need Australian case law or court decisions. Also: AI legal research is a starting point — verify all legal conclusions with qualified Australian legal counsel.

auth.notes: No authentication required — accesses public legislation databases.

pricing.notes: Free open source. Australian legislation is public domain. No API costs.

performance.rate_limits: No documented rate limits; depends on upstream legislation database

known_agent_gotchas: Legal research AI output requires verification by qualified counsel — do not use as final legal authority
Legislation text may be current as of a specific date — check for recent amendments
Community server (Ansvar-Systems) — verify legislation database freshness for time-sensitive compliance
Australian privacy law (Privacy Act) applies if agent processes personal data alongside legislation queries
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public legislation data — non-sensitive. No auth required. HTTPS. AI legal analysis requires human expert review before acting on conclusions.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public legislation data. No auth. HTTPS. Legal research tool — always validate with counsel.
